markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 12
#### Article 49. Effect of & Short Title of Chap.
##### § 3000 — Uniformity of interpretation

Titles one, seven and succeeding titles shall be so interpreted and construed as to effectuate their general purpose to make uniform the law of those states which enact them.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*

subsections.text: Titles one, seven and succeeding titles shall be so interpreted and construed as to effectuate their general purpose to make uniform the law of those states which enact them.
